# Rework Order（返工单）

# Rework Order（返工单）


## 1.Operational Process（操作流程）


### If the factory itself has a rework requirement for production, a rework order shall be created here.（若工厂自己针对生产有返工需求，在此处新增返工单）


[图片1: null]


### After clicking “Add New”, enter the relevant information on this page.（点击新增后，在此页面输入相关信息）


PS：带红色※的，都是必填项
PS: All items marked with a red asterisk (*) are mandatory fields.


[图片2: null]

1.若工厂生管、PE等岗位需要新增人员，请联系工厂IT管理员
2.若CVTE生管、PE等岗位需要新增，请联系CVTE驻场团队新增审核
1、If positions such as Production Planning & Control (PPC) and Process Engineering (PE) in the factory need to add staff, please contact the factory IT administrator.
2、If positions such as Production Planning & Control (PPC) and Process Engineering (PE) at CVTE need to be added, please contact the CVTE on-site team to initiate the addition approval process.


### After submission, an entry of the document similar to the one in the image will be generated. Once approved by the corresponding position, select the document.（提交后会生成类似图片中的一行单据，待对应岗位审核后，选中单据）


[图片3: null]


### Click “ Barcode Reset”（点击条码重置）


[图片4: null]


### Select the appropriate barcode scanning type based on different rework requirements.（ 根据不同的返工要求，选择不同的扫码类型）


[图片5: null]


1.若整个生产批次返工，选择生产批次返工即可
2.若整箱返工，选择箱号条码，扫需要返工的箱条码即可
3.若部分板卡返工，选择板卡条码，扫对应板卡即可
4.扫描后，就可以将板卡返回至对应的工步重新生产即可
1、If the entire production batch requires rework, simply select “Production Batch Rework”.
2、If an entire carton requires rework, select “Carton Barcode” and scan the barcode of the carton that needs rework.
3、If some boards require rework, select “Board Barcode” and scan the corresponding boards.
4、After scanning, the boards can be returned to the corresponding work step for re-production.
